Classification.AdvisoryBanner.label: Legal notice
GoogleWorkspace.disconnect.body: This will stop directory sync and remove stored credentials. Existing imported users are not affected. Continue?
Users.deactivateDialog.body: This will immediately revoke their access. They will be logged out of all sessions. This action can be reversed.
organization.kleinunternehmer.confirmDis: Future invoices will resume standard German VAT handling (19% / 7% / RC). Existing invoices are unaffected.
